concept.title: Concept Topic Template
concept.shortdesc: Use this template guidance to write concept topics that build mental models before procedural steps.

ul.li: Use a single clear topic statement in shortdesc.
Start with the core concept in plain language.
Add sections that answer what, why, and when.

ol.li: Definition of the concept and its scope.
How the concept relates to pipeline stages or contracts.
Operational implications for operators and plugin developers.

ul.li: Do not include command steps unless they support concept understanding.
Prefer explicit terminology used by the codebase and schemas.
Add diagrams when the concept includes sequence or layer boundaries.
